fields.meta_description: Expert consultancy in Agriculture (Beekeeping), Environment, and Occupational Health & Safety
fields.footer_copyright_text: © 2026 Fee-Vert Solution Limited. All rights reserved.

fields.title: Expert Consultancy Services
fields.subtitle: Professional services in Commercial Beekeeping, Environmental Management, and Occupational Health & Safety

fields.title: About Fee-Vert
fields.description: Fee-Vert is registered to provide consultancy and mentorship services on Agriculture & Livestock (including Commercial Beekeeping), Environment, and Occupational Health & Safety (OHS). We serve smallholder farmers, cooperatives, NGOs, government institutions, private agribusiness companies, and conservation organizations.
fields.mission: To provide high-quality, practical, and compliant consultancy services at reasonable prices
fields.vision: To be the leading consultancy firm in East Africa for sustainable agriculture, environmental stewardship, and workplace safety

fields.name: admin
fields.description: System Administrator - Full Access

fields.name: consultant
fields.description: Consultant - Can manage consultations and bookings

fields.name: Normal Employee
fields.description: Regular employee - Limited access

fields.name: client
fields.description: Default client role - Basic access

fields.name: Commercial Beekeeping
fields.description: Apiary establishment, honey processing, training, pollination services, and beekeeping consultancy

fields.name: Environmental Services
fields.description: EIA/ESIA, environmental audits, pollution control, climate change, natural resources management, and GIS services

fields.name: Occupational Health & Safety
fields.description: OHS compliance, risk assessment, workplace audits, training, incident investigation, and safety management systems

fields.name: Apiary Establishment & Management
fields.description: Site selection, design and installation of modern beehives (Langstroth, Top-bar), apiary layout planning, colony stocking, routine hive inspection, pest and disease control, and seasonal management.

fields.name: Supply of Beekeeping Equipment & Inputs
fields.description: Supply of beehives, protective gear (bee suits, gloves, smokers), hive tools, bee colonies (nucleus colonies and queen bees), and honey harvesting equipment.

fields.name: Honey & Bee Products Processing
fields.description: Honey harvesting and extraction, processing, filtration, packaging, and production of value-added products (beeswax, propolis, royal jelly, bee venom). Quality control and certification support.

fields.name: Beekeeping Training & Capacity Building
fields.description: Practical training for beginner and advanced beekeepers, farmer field schools, demonstration apiaries, modern beekeeping techniques, hive management, post-harvest handling, and value addition.

fields.name: Pollination Services
fields.description: Provision of managed bee colonies for crop pollination, pollination contracts with farmers and agribusinesses, monitoring and evaluation of pollination efficiency, and advisory services.

fields.name: Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA/ESIA)
fields.description: Screening and scoping of projects, full Environmental and Social Impact Assessments (ESIA), preparation of Environmental Impact Statements (EIS), stakeholder consultations, and Environmental and Social Management Plans (ESMPs).

fields.name: Environmental Audits & Compliance Monitoring
fields.description: Environmental compliance audits, performance monitoring and reporting, legal compliance registers, post-EIA audit and follow-up studies, due diligence audits for investors and financiers.

fields.name: Pollution Control & Waste Management
fields.description: Solid waste management planning, hazardous waste management, waste minimization and circular economy solutions, air pollution control strategies, wastewater treatment and effluent management.

fields.name: Climate Change & Sustainability Services
fields.description: Climate risk and vulnerability assessments, greenhouse gas (GHG) inventories and carbon footprinting, carbon credit and offset project development, climate adaptation and mitigation strategies, ESG advisory and reporting.

fields.name: Environmental Data Management & GIS Services
fields.description: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) mapping, remote sensing and environmental data analysis, environmental database development, monitoring dashboards and reporting systems.

fields.name: OHS Compliance & Legal Advisory
fields.description: Interpretation and implementation of national OHS laws and regulations (OSHA), workplace registration and compliance support, development of compliance checklists and legal registers, representation during inspections and audits.

fields.name: Workplace Risk Assessment & Hazard Identification
fields.description: Comprehensive workplace risk assessments (HIRA), Job Safety Analysis (JSA), hazard identification (physical, chemical, biological, ergonomic, psychosocial), risk control planning using hierarchy of controls.

fields.name: Occupational Health & Safety Audits
fields.description: Internal and external OHS audits, compliance audits against national laws and international standards (ISO 45001), gap analysis and corrective action planning, pre-certification and surveillance audits.

fields.name: OHS Training & Capacity Building
fields.description: Occupational safety training programs: general workplace safety, fire safety and emergency response, first aid and CPR, working at heights, confined space entry, electrical safety. Toolbox talks and on-site coaching.

fields.name: Incident Investigation & Reporting
fields.description: Investigation of workplace accidents and near-misses, root cause analysis (RCA), preparation of incident reports and corrective actions, support in legal and insurance documentation.
